ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the GDP value */,
  "gdp_value" REAL /* GDP value for the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GDP data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the consumption value */,
  "ng_consumption" REAL /* Natural gas consumption value for the country */,
  "consumption_sector" TEXT /* Sector of consumption (e.g., residential, industrial) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the consumption data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdd_data" (
  "hdd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDD record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the HDD value */,
  "hdd_value" REAL /* Heating Degree Days value for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the HDD data was recorded */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdd_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_data" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the dependency percentage */,
  "dependency_percent" REAL /* Natural gas dependency percentage for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dependency data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., Inflation Rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Renewables, Fossil Fuels) */,
  "source_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of each energy source in the country's total energy mix */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy source data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_sources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy statistic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the statistic */,
  "total_energy_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption value for the country */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Energy efficiency rating for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy statistic data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the trade volume */,
  "import_volume" REAL /* Volume of natural gas imports */,
  "export_volume" REAL /* Volume of natural gas exports */,
  "trade_partner" TEXT /* Country with which the trade was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewable_energy_data" (
  "renewable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewable energy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the renewable metrics */,
  "solar_capacity" REAL /* Total solar energy capacity in MW */,
  "wind_capacity" REAL /* Total wind energy capacity in MW */,
  "hydro_capacity" REAL /* Total hydro energy capacity in MW */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the renewable energy data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renewable_energy_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the emission data */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in million metric tons */,
  "ch4_emissions" REAL /* CH4 emissions in million metric tons */,
  "n2o_emissions" REAL /* N2O emissions in million metric tons */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the emission data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_security_data" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy security record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the security metrics */,
  "energy_import_dependency" REAL /* Energy import dependency as a percentage of total energy consumption */,
  "fuel_diversity" REAL /* Fuel diversity index */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy security data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_security_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the preferences */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Preferred dashboard layout for the user */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Preferred chart type for the user */,
  "color_scheme" TEXT /* Preferred color scheme for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
